google.note: Best platform for HVAC. High-intent 'near me' searches drive immediate leads.

meta.note: Strong for retargeting and seasonal promotions. Lead forms work well for AC tune-ups and maintenance plans.

linkedin.note: Not recommended. HVAC is a local consumer service — LinkedIn users aren't searching for AC repair.

google.note: Top platform. Emergency plumbing searches ('burst pipe', 'water heater leaking') convert immediately.

meta.note: Decent for retargeting and water heater replacement promos. Not ideal for emergency services.

linkedin.note: Not recommended for residential plumbing. Commercial plumbing contractors may see some B2B value.

google.note: Excellent ROI. 'Roof replacement' and storm damage keywords drive high-value leads.

meta.note: Great for storm damage awareness campaigns and before/after showcase ads. Strong visual platform for roofing.

linkedin.note: Not recommended for residential roofing.

google.note: High-intent searches drive strong leads. Emergency electrical work converts well.

meta.note: Works for panel upgrades, EV charger installations, and generator promos.

linkedin.note: Not recommended for residential electrical services.

google.note: Best platform. Septic emergencies drive immediate high-intent searches.

meta.note: Limited value. Septic services are urgency-driven and don't perform well as social ads.

linkedin.note: Not recommended.

google.note: Excellent for pest emergencies and seasonal pest control. High search volume.

meta.note: Great for seasonal awareness campaigns ('mosquito season is here') and recurring service plans.

linkedin.note: Not recommended for residential pest control.

google.note: Strong seasonal performance. Pool building and maintenance keywords convert well.

meta.note: Excellent visual platform — pool builds, before/after photos perform very well. Great for seasonal promos.

linkedin.note: Not recommended.

meta.note: Moderate value for storm prep and seasonal trimming campaigns.
